message:
test: extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard with fd90.10-16 promotions

Consolidates the prelude-surface assertions from fd90.10/11/12/13/14/15/16
into the canonical prelude_completeness_compile_guard in src/lib.rs.
The bead-specific compile guards in tests/readme_quick_example.rs
remain in place for traceability; this gives the lib's guard a single-
point-of-truth view of every prelude promotion.

Adds fn-pointer name-checks for:
- fd90.10/11: 13 SQL inspector free fns (inspect, list_sql_*, sql_*,
  truncate_sql_table)
- fd90.12: series_to_arrow_array (series_from_arrow_array is generic
  over impl Into<String> so deferred to the integration test)
- fd90.13: 9 SQL schema/iterator return types
- fd90.14: 8 fp-types pandas helpers + 3 range fns
- fd90.15: SparseDType, AggFunc, GroupByOptions / GroupByExecutionOptions,
  index_to_frame / index_to_series
- fd90.16: DateRangeError / TimedeltaRangeError, cast_scalar_owned,
  read_csv_with_index_cols / read_csv_with_index_cols_path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
